name: Qualified Trust Severance

eligibility.description: The trust must be divided on a fractional basis and provide for the same succession of interests in the aggregate.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a single trust with an inclusion ratio between 0 and 1 to be severed into two separate trusts: one with an inclusion ratio of 0 (fully exempt) and one with an inclusion ratio of 1 (fully taxable).
